svg.title: Prometheus: Unified enterprise data platform
svg.desc: Prometheus solves three enterprise pain points: data validation, API integration, and production debugging through one integrated AI-powered platform.
svg.text: Solves 3 pain points: Data Quality + API Integration + Production Debugging

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about data validation module')
sendPrompt('Tell me about API integration module')
sendPrompt('Tell me about log debugging module')
sendPrompt('What does the schema validator agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the anomaly agent do?')
sendPrompt('What does the root cause agent do?')
sendPrompt('What audit trail does it provide?')

svg.text: Prometheus prevents enterprise data issues across the full pipeline
